pi_items.source: task.json description (line 13), setup_task.sh (line 32: INSERT MRN-1001 John Doe Active), export_result.sh (line 22)
export_result.sh (line 36: TEST_MISSING='MRN-9999'). Database only inserts MRN-1001 through MRN-1005 (setup_task.sh lines 31-36), so MRN-9999 does not exist and should return HTTP 404.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves a synthetic patient lookup REST API with hardcoded test data. The channel is named 'Patient_Status_API' and listens on port 6670. Test data includes MRN-1001 (John Doe, Active) which exists in the database, and MRN-9999 which does not exist. The database contains five synthetic patient records (MRN-1001 through MRN-1005) created by the setup script with patient names John Doe, Jane Smith, Robert Johnson, Emily Davis, and Michael Brown. No real patient data or external data sources are involved.
